claim_text: Saturn is in the 7th house in Libra at birth, conjunct Mars, with degree 22°27′04″ in Vishakha nakshatra pada 1.
Mars and Saturn form a Hidden Raja Yoga by exalted conjunction in the 7th house Libra, per SIG.MSR.015, with strength score 0.80 and mixed valence.

claim_text: The chart has five foundation signatures that function as the lens through which all other features must be read, per UCN Part I §I.1.
This chart's career architecture has seven independent astrological systems all designating Mercury as the primary operational planet, making it among the most structured for professional excellence.
